query: What is the current level of crude oil in the US Strategic Petroleum Reserve as of June 2026, per EIA weekly data (WCSSTUS1)? What has been the weekly trajectory over the past 3-6 months (fills or releases)?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings:

**Current SPR level:** As of the latest EIA weekly data (week ending **July 3, 2026**), the U.S. Strategic Petroleum Reserve held **319.489 million barrels** (EIA series WCSSTUS1) — the lowest level since April 1983. For the June 2026 reference point specifically, the SPR ended June at **325.655 million barrels** (June 26) and started the month at **349.192 million barrels** (June 5).

**Weekly trajectory (past 3–6 months):** A clear, uninterrupted **release/drawdown** pattern:
- **Q1 2026:** flat-to-slightly-higher, plateauing at a 2026 peak of ~415.44M barrels (mid-Feb–mid-March)
- **Late March onward:** sharp, sustained releases began (first draw week ending March 27)
- **May–June:** heavy weekly draws, frequently **8–10 million barrels/week**
- **Net decline:** ~96 million barrels from the March peak to July 3 (~3.5 months); ~94M over the trailing 6 months; down ~20.7% year-over-year

**Driver:** The releases are tied to a government program responding to the **war involving Iran/Middle East conflict** (began ~end of February 2026), aimed at offsetting a global supply shortfall.

Data was pulled directly from EIA's official WCSSTUS1 handler and cross-validated against YCharts (which matched EIA exactly). Per instructions, I've reported observed trends only and have not forecast future levels.

sources.title: Weekly U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in SPR (Thousand Barrels) — EIA series WCSSTUS1
sources.snippet: Complete 2026 weekly SPR series: Jan 2 (413,464) through Jul 3 (319,489) thousand barrels.

sources.title: US Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve Stocks (Weekly)
sources.snippet: 319.49M bbl for Wk of Jul 03 2026, down from 325.66M last week and down 20.68% from one year ago (402.76M).

sources.title: Strategic Petroleum Reserve Hits 1983 Low: 7 Crucial Facts Behind America's Thinner Oil Buffer
sources.snippet: SPR at 319.5M bbl (wk ending Jul 3, 2026), lowest since April 1983; releases tied to war involving Iran; ~172M bbl total release effort.

sources.title: DOE has released 17.5 million barrels from the Strategic Petroleum Reserve since March — EIA
sources.snippet: DOE released 17.5M barrels between weeks ending March 20 and April 24, 2026; 7.1M in the week ending April 24 (most since Oct 7, 2022).

sources.title: How Much Oil Is Left in the U.S. Strategic Petroleum Reserve Today?
sources.snippet: SPR held roughly 349 million barrels as of the first week of June 2026, smallest since the early 1980s.

sources.title: Oil Inventory Levels — US Crude, SPR & OECD Days of Cover
sources.snippet: US commercial crude oil inventories ~408.4 million barrels (excluding SPR), roughly 7% below the 5-year average.
